name: anti-claude-slides
description: Build dense, bounded-cell fact-card slides — institutional, flat, Montserrat on ivory, navy/gray/teal/gold, single-title headers (no subtitles), sparing monochrome Lucide icons — under a strict hard-rule spec. Generate or review slides and decks as self-contained 1280x720 HTML. No templates: every slide is composed fresh from tokens + primitives, gated by a checklist.
